subcodes.first_line: I beseech Thee, O my God, Lord of Names and Creator of the heavens, by Thy Name through which Thou hast subdued all things, to preserve [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اسئلک اللهم یا اله الاسماء و فاطر السماء باسمک الذی به سخرت الاشیاء بان تحفظ
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @nearness to God
